title: The EV71 neutralizing antibody test
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"35d1k","text":"This protocol describes the process for the neutralizing antibody test of EV71.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"b8srj","text":"The serum neutralizing antibody response is the major indicator of EV71 protective immunity. The neutralizing antibody test of EV71 followed the standard protocol of a neutralization test. Serum samples were heat-treated for 30 minutes at 56°C, serially diluted and mixed with 100 50% tissue culture-infective doses (TCID50) of the EV71 TW/2272/98 strain (GenBank accession number AF119795), and incubated for 2 hours at 37°C. Thereafter, rhabdomyosarcoma cells were added into each reaction well and incubated at 37℃ in 5% CO2 incubator. Each plate included a cell control, serum control, and virus back-titration. The cytopathic effect was monitored from 5 to 6days after incubation, and the serotiter was determined when the cytopathic effect was observed in one TCID50 of the virus back-titration. Seropositivity was defined as a serotiter ≥8.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"sub","offset":526,"length":1}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"ekifs","text":"Set water bath to 56℃","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"9ptbk","text":"Confirm that the RD cells are healthy","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"60egm","text":"Serum or plasma","type":"align-justify","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"9rrcm","text":"96 well microtiterplate","type":"align-justify","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"2suli","text":"1x PBS","type":"align-justify","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"amerc","text":"DMEM with 2% FBS medium","type":"align-justify","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"3fput","text":"Multichannel Pipette (8 or 12)","type":"align-justify","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"9ggij","text":"1.5 ml eppendrof","type":"align-justify","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"b7hml","text":"EV71 TW/2272/98 strain (GenBank accession number AF119795)","type":"align-justify","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Inactivate serum (300 μl) at 56℃ for 30 min %s %s

Make 2 fold serial dilution of serum from 1:4 to 1:256 with 2% FBS DMEM %s %s a. Add 50 μl 2% FBS DMEM in well B to H b. ● means add 50μl serum sample c. After dilution, every well has 50μl sample d. ex. sample1-1 well H: serum control; sample 1-2 well H: cell control; 1-1 and 1-2 are duplicate

Prepare control wells including virus control, serum control and cell control. Virus control well：back titration from 100, 10, 1 to 1/10 100TCID 50 Serum control：add serum and cell only, no virus Cell control：add cell only, no serum and no virus
Add 50 μl of adjusted virus suspension (100TCID50EV71) onto the well A to well G of microtiterplate, shake reaction well slightly
Incubate above reaction wells at 37℃for 2 hours in 5% CO 2 incubator
Prepare RD cells suspension and adjust cell concentration to 1×10 5 /ml
Add 100μl of adjusted RD cell into each reaction well after 2 hours in step5
Incubate wells at 37℃in 5% CO 2 incubator for 5-6 days until virus control well reach 100TCID 50
Observe CPE in each well under reverse microscope after 5-6 days incubation
Check CPE in control wells Virus control well：100% CPE in 100TCID 50 and 10TCID 50 ; 50% CPE in 1TCID 50 , < 10% CPE in 1/10TCID 50 Serum control well：no CPE Cell control well：no CPE
The NT titer was calculated as the reciprocal value of the last dilution of the antiserum that completely inhibited the CPE after incubation.
Seropositivity was defined as a reciprocal of the serotiter ≧ 8.
creator: Ai Ling Cheng
